creator: jah4007@cs.rit.edu
text:
Update the cups port.

Please  email me directly with comments/problems/suggestions
(I am not on freebsd-ports list)

Fix: 

Download these files:
http://www.rit.edu/~jah4007/FreeBSD/patch-cups.sh.in
http://www.rit.edu/~jah4007/FreeBSD/cups.patch

cd /usr/ports/print/cups
patch < /path/to/cups.patch
cp /path/to/patch-cups.sh.in files/
